Video.summary: Experience the "frozen tundra fury" of the Freestyle Mania Championship Series as Monster Jam takes over the Resch Center in Green Bay, Wisconsin. Local fan-favorite Mikayla Tulachka in Megalodon looks to defend her home turf against a field of elite competitors, including the "black and green wrecking machine" Weston Anderson in Grave Digger. The intensity reaches a fever pitch in the high-stakes JCB Racing competition, where turn-cone disqualifications and photo finishes determine who advances to the finals. As the engines roar, drivers push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute limit in a gravity-defying Best Trick contest and a chaotic Freestyle session where anything can happen.
Video.title: Resch Center - Green Bay, WI

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series East ends its Florida run on a mud filled track in Jacksonville. Tyler Menninga looks to mudslide the momentum from a perfect event in Orlando while Blake Granger rides his International Series success back home in the states as he pilots Max-D.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Over 72,000 fans witnessed the historic freestyle action from the Pontiac Silverdome, on January 7, 2006.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the Monster Jam freestyle action from the Georgia Dome, on February 12, 2011.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: On May 14, 2021 Monster Jam's 2021 season continues in St. Louis, MO!
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: The drivers bring the heat to Glendale tonight at the University of Phoenix Stadium
Video.title: University of Phoenix Stadium - Glendale, AZ

University of Phoenix Stadium - Glendale, AZ
University of Phoenix Stadium - Glendale, AZ

Video.summary: Freestyle action from a jam-packed Ford Field stadium in Detroit, MI, on January 20, 2007.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: Hang on tight! Monster Jam's 2006 season continues with racing action from Raymond James Stadium, on January 21, 2006.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Don't miss the exciting freestyle action from Chase Field, on January 30, 2010.
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ - Freestyle

Video.summary: There is a new series points leader on Stadium Championship Series Red as Adam Anderson continues his incredible 18th season behind the wheel of Grave Digger. Can Camden Murphy stop his slide and lead Bakugan Dragonoid back to the top of the leaderboard?
Video.title: TIAA Bank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Get ready for all the freestyle action from Reliant Stadium at Houston, TX, on January 5, 2008.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: On March 14, 2021, Monster Jam's 2021 season continues with even more excitement at Raymond James Stadium.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: It's a jam-packed night in Houston- watch the best of the best compete with racing action from Reliant Stadium, on February 5, 2005.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Watch with the standing-room-only crowd as Monster Jam freestyle action comes to you from El Paso, TX, on March 1, 2008.
Video.title: Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle

Image.alt: Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle
Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle
Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the Georgia Dome on January 8, 2015 with all the Racing and Freestyle action!
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into the Oakland Alameda County Coliseum on February 18, 2017 for some freestyle action and fun!
Video.title: Oakland Alameda Coliseum - Oakland, CA

Video.summary: It's time for freestyle carnage! This week, St. Louis is in for one wild ride from the Trans World Dome during the 2001 season of Monster Jam!
Video.title: Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Image.alt: Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle
Trans World Dome - St. Louis, MO - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam Primetime continues with even more action in Indianapolis.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 15 at Pinnacle Bank Arena in Lincoln NE.
Video.title: Pinnacle Bank Arena - Lincoln, NE

Video.summary: Don't miss the thrilling second half of the freestyle action from World Finals XVII on March 25, 2016 at Sam Boyd Stadium.
Video.title: World Finals XVII - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 2

Video.summary: Check out the fun at the Carrier Dome in Syracuse, NY during Monster Jam's 2014 season!
Video.title: Carrier Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: This epic compilation covers "The Professor" himself- Tom Meents over the years of 2000-2011.
Video.title: Best of Tom Meents

Video.summary: Even when there's rain or mud, these monster trucks bring their A-Game. Get down and dirty with this compilation of muddy Monster Jam trucks! AND - Witness some of the best freestyles ever to hit the World Finals field from 2000 to 2011.
Video.title: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Image.alt: Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks
Best of World Finals and Muddy Trucks

Video.summary: High-speed brackets and split-second decisions define this Monster Jam Fast Track showdown as elite drivers push their trucks to the limit in racing and skills competition. Tyler Menninga’s Grave Digger sets the tone early, but relentless pressure from Zombie, El Toro Loco, Megalodon, and Vendetta turns every run into a must-win moment. Clean launches, aggressive cornering, and costly mistakes reshape the leaderboard as rivals trade momentum. With points on the line and no room for error, this episode delivers pure Monster Jam intensity from start to finish.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA
